CREATE TABLE rdf_terms (id INT PRIMARY KEY, term VARCHAR(255));
SELECT sameTerm((SELECT term FROM rdf_terms WHERE id = 1), (SELECT term FROM rdf_terms WHERE id = 3));
SELECT sameTerm(?x, ?y) WHERE ?x = (SELECT term FROM rdf_terms WHERE id = 1) AND ?y = (SELECT term FROM rdf_terms WHERE id = 3);
SELECT sameTerm(?x, 'termB') WHERE ?x IN (SELECT term FROM rdf_terms WHERE id IN (1, 2));
SELECT sameTerm(?x, (SELECT term FROM rdf_terms WHERE id = 2)) FROM rdf_terms WHERE term IN (SELECT term FROM rdf_terms);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rdf_terms WHERE sameTerm(term, (SELECT term FROM rdf_terms WHERE id = 1)) = TRUE;

SELECT sameTerm((SELECT term FROM rdf_terms WHERE id = 1), (SELECT term FROM rdf_terms WHERE id = 1)) AND sameTerm((SELECT term FROM rdf_terms WHERE id = 2), (SELECT term FROM rdf_terms WHERE id = 2));
SELECT sameTerm(t1.term, t2.term) FROM rdf_terms t1, rdf_terms t2 WHERE t1.id <> t2.id;
SELECT sameTerm((SELECT term FROM rdf_terms WHERE id = 1), 'termA') AS identity_check;
